inputs.label: Patient Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the patient in kilograms

inputs.label: Drug Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of anesthetic agent in percentage (g/100mL)

inputs.label: Desired Dose Rate
inputs.businessContext: Desired dose of anesthetic per kilogram of body weight

inputs.label: Max Safe Dose Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum safe dose of the anesthetic without epinephrine (e.g., 4 mg/kg for lidocaine)

inputs.label: Epinephrine Added
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether epinephrine is added (1) or not (0). Increases max safe dose by 75%.

inputs.label: Volume On Hand
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of anesthetic solution available in the vial
